# CANDIDATE: SNIPER_VIX_TREND_OOS_CONFIRMED

**Filed:** 2026-05-24
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** new_trigger
**Status:** DRAFT (OOS-CONFIRMED, awaiting J shadow-trade anchors per OP-16)

## Hypothesis

Adding a VIX-trend filter (VIX >= 18 AND VIX > 5-day average = escalating VIX) to SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK eliminates the phase-A damage observed in the original VIX>=18-only grinder (OOS -$833). VIX escalating indicates fear regime in place; VIX elevated but flat (phase-A: Nov 2025 - Feb 2026) produces WR<40%.

## Mechanism

- **Entry:** SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK trigger (level break with volume confirmation)
- **VIX filter:** VIX >= 18.0 AND VIX > 5-day rolling average (VIX escalating)
- **Exit:** vol_mult=0.9 (Stage 2 refinement), TP1=30%, runner trail
- **Recommended params:** vix_lower=18.0, vol_mult=0.9, min_stars=2, prox=2.0

**Note:** OP-16 inapplicable — this is a new trade class (SNIPER) with only 1 J anchor (5/04). Requires J to build 3+ live SNIPER shadow trades before OP-16 recomputation.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper realizes ~14% of headline
2. **Sample bias:** N=40 total trades (19 OOS), selected from 120-combo sweep. Stage 2 found vol_mult=0.9 as sole driver — other params showed identical OOS. Risk: parameter selection from single sweep.
3. **Out-of-sample:** PASS. IS (2025-01..2025-10) n=19 $2,710 | OOS (2025-11..2026-05) n=21 $2,713. WF ratio=1.084 (gate ≥0.50).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS. BS-sim only; no OPRA validation yet.
5. **Failure modes:**
   - Regime concentration: 2026-Q1 = 105% of OOS P&L. Without Q1, OOS is marginally negative.
   - WF ratio 1.084 is marginal (close to 1.0 — limited headroom).
   - VIX window sensitivity: 5d uniquely optimal; 3/7/10/15d all FAIL.
6. **Concentration:** Top quarter (Q1-2026) = 105% of OOS P&L. High regime dependence.

## Pre-merge gate

1. Gym 70/70 PASS
2. J confirms 3+ live SNIPER signals in `journal/sniper-shadow-trades.jsonl`
3. Real-fills validation on top-3 OOS trades
4. OP-16 recomputed vs SNIPER-specific anchors (requires J live trades)
5. J weekend ratification (Rule 9)

## Confidence

9 / 10 — OOS walk-forward passes, 5d VIX window uniquely optimal, Stage 2 vol_mult=0.9 confirmed as sole improvement driver. Deduct 1 for regime concentration (Q1 dominance) and lack of real-fills validation.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

- Supersedes #13 SNIPER_VIX18_GRINDER (OOS FAIL, WF=-0.224)
- Complements #15 SNIPER_VIX_TREND_STAGE2_ENTRY_SWEEP (same filter, vol_mult refinement)
- No conflict with existing bear-only or ORB gates
